settings.banner_sub: IT Didn't start with a business plan

settings.headline_text: It began with a cancer diagnosis.
settings.body_text:
We realized we needed products that were actually safe, affordable and accessible - so we made our own.

We spent a year at the local farmer's markets shaking hands and refining every batch based on your feedback. We searched high & low to source the highest quality tallow and create the purest products possible.

Today - our products are in thousands of homes across the country. We only sell what we're willing to put on our own skin.
settings.footer_text: From our family to yours, it's that simple.

settings.label: Direct Impact
settings.description: As we grow, we are committed to dedicating a portion of our proceeds to support individuals and families navigating the same challenges we once faced

settings.label: Radical Purity
settings.description: Providing truly clean, tallow-based products that families can trust without second-guessing the label.

settings.label: Fair Pricing
settings.description: We are ending the trend of price gouging in the tallow industry to ensure healthy skin is affordable for everyone.

settings.label: American Sourced
settings.description: Every jar is built on ingredients from local family farms, ensuring quality and transparency from the start.

settings.title: Our Commitment to You
settings.intro_text: We believe pure skincare should be accessible to everyone. Our mission is to provide clean, honest products at fair prices, while using our growth to support those walking the path we once did.

settings.title: Join The Hide Family
settings.description: Experience ancestral skincare made with the perfect blend of grass-fed tallow and organic botanicals that support a daily enhancement in skin health and clarity.

settings.custom_desc: The gold standard for full-body recovery. This whipped formula sinks deep to end chronic dryness and irritation, leaving a soft, velvet finish.
Heavy-duty protection for your hardest-working skin. This firm balm creates a weather-proof barrier to seal and repair on the move
Your daily defense against cracked lips. One swipe delivers deep hydration to restore elasticity and prevent chapping in any environment
A full-body reset that cleans without compromise. This tallow-rich bar lifts away grime while keeping your skin hydrated and smooth

settings.title: Born From Purpose
settings.story: Hide didn’t start as a business — it started at home. When my wife was diagnosed with breast cancer, everything we put in and on our bodies came under a microscope. “Clean” suddenly wasn’t a trend word — it became non-negotiable.

settings.title: When "Natural" Meant Nothing
settings.story:
I already knew tallow worked. But when we actually paid attention, the whole “natural” aisle — and even most tallow brands — were just more of the same: overpriced jars, poorly sourced ingredients, and unnecessary extras.

Natural wasn’t natural — it was marketing.

settings.title: We Searched for Better
settings.story:
We spent months visiting farms and talking with ranchers — comparing tallow sources firsthand. We wanted to know exactly where it came from and how the cattle were raised.

If it wasn’t the best — we didn’t use it.

settings.title: Radical Simplicity
settings.story:
So I started making it myself — sourcing better tallow and keeping it truly simple. No fillers. No fluff. Just real nourishment our skin actually recognizes.

And it worked.

settings.title: Farmer's Market Era
settings.story:
We spent a full year at local farmers markets — selling face to face, shaking hands, listening, and refining batch after batch. Real conversations with real people shaped every improvement we made.

That’s where this stopped being just “our” product — and started becoming something people asked for.

settings.title: It Spread On Its Own
settings.story: They shared it, and orders started coming in from all over the country.

settings.title: From Our Family To Yours
settings.story:
Everything we make exists for one reason — because we wanted something real for our own home first.

If we wouldn’t put it on our own skin, we won’t sell it.

From our family to yours.

settings.title: Arizona Made
settings.story: Hide was born in the desert and built for real life. If it could hold up here, we knew it could hold up anywhere.

settings.subtext: Ready for better skin? Explore our Tallow based products.
